name: arc-1
description: MCP server for SAP ABAP Development Tools (ADT). Read, write, search, activate, and manage ABAP objects in SAP systems.
long_description: ARC-1 connects Claude to SAP ABAP systems via the ABAP Development Tools (ADT) REST API. Provides 11 intent-based tools covering the full ABAP development lifecycle: read source code, create/update objects, search, activate, navigate references, run SQL queries, manage transports, lint, and diagnose runtime issues. Read-only by default with configurable safety gates. Supports on-premise SAP and BTP ABAP Environment.

tools.name: SAPRead
tools.description: Read SAP ABAP objects (programs, classes, interfaces, functions, CDS, DDIC, etc.)

tools.name: SAPWrite
tools.description: Create or update ABAP source code and DDIC metadata

tools.name: SAPSearch
tools.description: Search for ABAP objects by name, pattern, or content

tools.name: SAPActivate
tools.description: Activate ABAP objects, run syntax checks, unit tests, and ATC checks

tools.name: SAPNavigate
tools.description: Navigate code: find definitions, references, where-used, completions

tools.name: SAPQuery
tools.description: Preview table data or run SQL queries

tools.name: SAPContext
tools.description: Get compressed dependency context for ABAP objects (7-30x token savings)

tools.name: SAPLint
tools.description: Lint ABAP source code with abaplint rules

tools.name: SAPDiagnose
tools.description: Analyze short dumps, profiler traces, and runtime diagnostics

tools.name: SAPManage
tools.description: Delete ABAP objects or manage object lifecycle

sap_url.title: SAP System URL
sap_url.description: URL of your SAP system (e.g., http://host:50000 or https://host:44300)

sap_user.title: SAP Username
sap_user.description: Your SAP user ID for authentication

sap_insecure.title: Skip TLS Verification
sap_insecure.description: Skip TLS certificate verification (for self-signed certificates)

sap_read_only.title: Read-Only Mode
sap_read_only.description: Block all write operations (recommended for safety)
